queries.question: In what historical era is the longest opera set in?
queries.sql: SELECT Historical_Era FROM Operas ORDER BY Duration DESC LIMIT 1;
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?historical_era WHERE {
  ?operas a :Operas .
  ?operas p:Historical_Era ?historical_era .
  ?operas p:Duration ?duration_o .
}
ORDER BY DESC(?duration_o)
LIMIT 1

queries.question: Which setting has the longest opera?
queries.sql: SELECT Location FROM Operas ORDER BY Duration DESC LIMIT 1;
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?location WHERE {
  ?operas a :Operas .
  ?operas p:location ?location .
  ?operas p:Duration ?duration_o .
}
ORDER BY DESC(?duration_o)
LIMIT 1

queries.question: Which setting has the longest opera?
queries.sql: SELECT Historical_Era, Location FROM Operas ORDER BY Duration DESC LIMIT 1;
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?historical_era ?location WHERE {
  ?operas a :Operas .
  ?operas p:Historical_Era ?historical_era .
  ?operas p:location ?location .
  ?operas p:Duration ?duration_o .
}
ORDER BY DESC(?duration_o)
LIMIT 1

queries.question: What is the title and setting of the opera composed by Mozart?
queries.sql: SELECT title, Historical_Era FROM Operas  JOIN Composers ON Composers.composerId = Operas.composerId  WHERE name like "%Mozart%";
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title ?historical_era WHERE {
  ?operas a :Operas .
  ?composers a :Composers .
  ?operas p:hasComposers ?composers .
  ?operas p:title ?title .
  ?operas p:Historical_Era ?historical_era .
  ?composers p:name ?name_lk .
  FILTER(REGEX(STR(?name_lk), "^.*Mozart.*$", "i"))
}

queries.question: What is the title and setting of the opera composed by Mozart?
queries.sql: SELECT title, Location FROM Operas  JOIN Composers ON Composers.composerId = Operas.composerId  WHERE name like "%Mozart%";

PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title ?location WHERE {
  ?operas a :Operas .

  ?operas p:hasComposers ?composers .
  ?operas p:title ?title .
  ?operas p:location ?location .
  ?composers p:name ?name_lk .

}
